title: shureee's Potions
description: Unique shapes of the Bottles, improving accessibility for colorblind players!
body:
Note: Versions 1.21.5+ do not require any external mods; however, versions pre-1.21.5 require CIT support, found in mods such as Optifine or CIT Resewn.

# Description
This Resource Pack aims to fix one of Minecraft's problems: the difficulty of distinguishing items with different properties. Here, I attempted to remake all the Bottles, each type having its unique shape and texture, easing gameplay for colorblind people. In addition, potions can also be differentiated by their extended length and power.

# Features
All of the Potions are changed accordingly depending on what they are:
- Its shape is usually associated with the effect it serves (heart for Regeneration, moon for Night Vision)
- If tilted by 45º, its a Splash Potion
- If tilted by 45º, without the cork, and with particles, it's a Lingering Potion
- The red band indicates that Redstone was applied to the potion, and its length increased
- The golden band indicates that Glowstone was applied to the potion, and its strength increased

![Potions v1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2138079a9933b6cca0a5ea18f60275da743b6eea.png)
